name: Formula: Enchant Shield - Intellect

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Formula: Enchant Shield - Intellect Phase 1 Item Level 65 Requires Enchanting (325) Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a shield to increase Intellect by 12.
